name: Ribbed Brass Battery Rechargeable Stick Lighter - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Quickly light candles or start up your fireplace with this Ribbed Brass Battery Rechargeable Stick Lighter from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made from brass-finish metal with a ribbed bottom half, this elegant electric stick lighter is easy to use and features a safety switch and indicator light. The rechargeable battery offers lasting use, and it comes with a USB-A to USB-C charging cable for your convenience.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
